title: Active Management and Performance Measurement: Which of the following measures accounts for the volatility of...
summary: Analyze a portfolio management concept related to Active Management and Performance Measurement.
prompt: Which of the following measures accounts for the volatility of portfolio returns relative to the risk-free rate?

options.text: The Sharpe Ratio measures the excess return per unit of risk, calculated as the
Minimizes risk for a given return

solution: The Sharpe Ratio measures the excess return per unit of risk, calculated as the difference between the portfolio return and the risk-free rate divided by the portfolio's standard deviation.
